name: Track Star Jacket
description: Introducing the Track Star Jacket in Jet Black, a relaxed fit track jacket crafted from nylon with a funnel neck and full zip fastening. The silhouette draws in at the waist through raglan sleeves and contrast panelling, with binding running into the raglan and side body for a defined, retro-inspired shape.

name: Represent England Bag
description: Introducing the Represent England Bag in Washed Black, a drawcord bag crafted from 100% polyester jacquard artwork fabric with a vegetal dye finish. The same archive artwork that runs through the Champions jerseys carries across to this piece, with mesh panels and a printed finish adding depth and detail.

name: Terrier
description: Reintroducing the Terrier in Black, a lightweight, hand-made sneaker built for the everyday wearer. Set on a sloping Vibram outsole, the sneaker features a matte body cage and breathable membrane, wrapped in tonal textures with a chunky knitted sock insert for all-day comfort. The upper is finished with hiking-style laces threaded through a rubber-dipped R-bar, matte piping, and 3M reflective detailing. A carbon-effect bubble showcases the Represent logo, while additional laces offer versatility straight out of the box.

name: Heaton Workwear Pant
description: Introducing the Heaton Workwear Pant in Jet Black, a wide straight leg carpenter pant crafted from hardwearing cotton canvas. Built for structure and durability, this piece delivers a clean, utilitarian silhouette with refined detailing throughout.Carpenter panelling across the front leg is reinforced with metal rivets, while functional pocket placement enhances everyday practicality. Finished with a branded leather back pocket patch and zip fly fastening for a timeless workwear look.

name: Spike Jersey
description: Introducing the Spike Jersey in Flat White, a standard oversized football jersey crafted from 100% polyester jacquard fabric with a red sublimation print across the surface. The archive artwork runs through the jacquard weave, bringing depth and heritage detail to a classic football silhouette.

name: Printed Vest
description: Introducing the Printed Vest in Flat White, a sleeveless piece crafted from 100% cotton rib jersey with a trompe l'oeil-style jumbo screen print across the front and back. The artwork was designed around the garment itself, applied after construction to create a seamless graphic that wraps the body naturally.

name: Represent Owners Club Jersey Short
description: Introducing the Owners Club Jersey Short in Sky Blue, a wide leg short crafted from 100% cotton with a carbon finish at 380gsm. A new fit with shaping to the outer leg for a flattering flare, designed for everyday wear with a minimal, considered aesthetic.

name: Represent Owners Club Rib Vest
description: Introducing the Owners Club Rib Vest in Jet Black, a fitted ribbed vest crafted from 95% cotton and 5% elastane at 330gsm. A new introduction to the Owners Club womens line, designed with a clean, body-conscious silhouette and contrast branding in a soft water based screen print with a vintage finish.
